The '''quivry''' was a four-legged hooved antelope-like creature native to [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]] and were hunted by the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotals]] to sharpen their senses.<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

{{Creature-stub}}
